printed.name: Side Kick Kneeling
printed.setup: Kneeling on one knee, shoulder over wrist, fingers facing away from body, top leg lifted to hip height (or higher), fingers touching behind head

movement.exhale: Swing top leg forward, dorsiflex foot (2 pulses)
movement.inhale: Swing top leg back, plantarflex foot (2 pulses)

cues: Maintain neutral pelvis (as close as possible)
Avoid sinking into supporting shoulder and rib cage
